text:
Accomplished CTO with 13+ years leading global teams across the
USA, France, Singapore, KSA, and UAE, driving innovation and
operational excellence. Expertise in scaling enterprise platforms,
developing cutting-edge AI/GenAI products, and architecting robust
cloud solutions. Extensive Singapore market experience from
leadership roles at RedMart (Lazada/Alibaba). Solid background in
GDPR, HIPAA, SOC2, and ISO-compliant solutions across healthcare,
fintech, e-commerce, ed-tech, and SaaS. Proficient in enterprise
integrations (HRIS, SSO, LTI) with a steadfast commitment to digital
transformation in high-growth environments.
